lemon_market_new_listings.description: Good condition.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has some visible scratches and small rust spots. The interior shows moderate wear, including minor stains and thinning upholstery. All mechanical systems are functional.
The car is in good condition. The exterior has minor cosmetic wear, and the interior is well-maintained. All mechanical components are functional and the vehicle runs well.

Get ready to hit the road in this dependable ride! It's a solid performer that’s been well-loved and is ready for its next chapter. While it shows some character through its honest cosmetic wear, it remains a functional and reliable choice for anyone looking for a great value. Perfect for a first car or a daily commuter!

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained by its previous owner. Mechanically, it is solid and drives smoothly, with no known issues under the hood. The exterior paint still looks great, though you will find a few minor rock chips and light surface scratches typical of a well-cared-for used car. The interior is clean and free of odors, showing only slight wear on the driver's seat and floor mats. All electronics, including the infotainment system and climate control, are fully functional. It is a reliable choice for anyone looking for a quality vehicle that is ready for the road.
This vehicle is in truly exceptional, mint condition and presents as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior paint is flawless with a deep,

This exceptional vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Maintained to a high standard, it exhibits consistent mechanical reliability and a well-appointed aesthetic. Each component has been vetted for operational excellence, ensuring a sophisticated driving experience that aligns with our commitment to quality. A definitive choice for those seeking significant value without compromise.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty car, and it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in solid shape and has been really well-loved, making it the perfect reliable companion for your daily commutes or fun weekend getaways. It runs great and is totally ready for a new home! Feel free to reach out with any questions—I'd love to see it go to someone who will enjoy it as much as I have!

Offering a driver-focused E46 M3 featuring the iconic S54B32 inline-six power plant with individual throttle bodies and high-pressure dual-VANOS. This example has undergone comprehensive subframe reinforcement and a recent rod bearing service, addressing critical preventive maintenance for the chassis and internals. The Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox shifts with precision, delivering power to the rear wheels via the factory variable M differential lock. Suspension geometry remains crisp with upgraded rear trailing arm bushings (RTABs) and refreshed dampers. While the exterior shows minor road-derived patina, the mechanical synchronization and high-revving linear power delivery remain exceptionally sharp.
Used car. Good condition. Clean title. All features functional. Well-maintained.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and remains in impressive overall condition, perfect for a driver who values both reliability and style. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine with only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with careful use. Inside, the cabin is clean and smoke-free, featuring well-preserved upholstery and fully functional electronics. Mechanically, it performs beautifully; the engine is responsive, the transmission shifts smoothly, and the suspension provides a comfortable, quiet ride. We have kept up with all scheduled servicing, and the tires have plenty of tread remaining. It’s a solid, dependable car that looks great on the road and is ready for its next owner.

This exceptional vehicle offers a distinguished combination of performance and reliability, meticulously maintained to ensure a superior driving experience. It presents in commendable condition, featuring a well-appointed interior and a robust mechanical profile that reflects consistent care. A premier selection for the professional seeking a high-caliber automobile that balances sophistication with enduring value. Rigorously inspected and ready for immediate delivery.

Presenting an exceptional opportunity to acquire a well-maintained vehicle of proven caliber. This unit exhibits a refined balance of performance and aesthetic integrity, having been preserved to a commendable standard. It remains a steadfast example of its class, offering the discerning driver a turn-key experience and enduring reliability.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid, reliable shape and has been well-loved over the years. It runs beautifully and is totally ready for its next owner to hit the road! I've taken great care of it, so you can feel confident getting behind the wheel. Come take it for a spin—you're going to love it!

This R32 Skyline GT-R is a mechanically sound example of JDM engineering. Powered by the legendary RB26DETT twin-turbocharged 2.6L inline-six, it features a robust power delivery through the ATTESA E-TS all-wheel-drive system. The drivetrain remains largely stock, retaining the factory twin ceramic turbochargers and the precision-engineered five-speed manual transmission. Suspension geometry is tight, benefiting from refreshed bushings and the functional Super HICAS four-wheel steering system. Recent maintenance includes a comprehensive fluid flush and timing belt replacement. While showing minor cosmetic patina consistent with its age, the chassis is rigid and the compression across all cylinders is within factory specifications, ensuring peak volumetric efficiency and throttle response.
Used car in good condition. Well-maintained engine. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear. Service records included. Runs well.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of performance and reliability. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish with only minor road wear consistent with careful use, while the interior remains smoke-free, featuring well-preserved upholstery and fully functional electronics. Mechanically, it is sound, having undergone a recent comprehensive multi-point inspection and oil service. With a complete folder of maintenance records and smooth handling on both city streets and highways, this car is ready for its next owner to drive away with confidence.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies consistent care and mechanical integrity. This unit offers a refined driving experience, featuring a well-preserved interior and a robust, reliable powertrain. It serves as an ideal choice for the discerning buyer seeking a high-quality automobile that balances performance with exceptional value.

This vehicle represents a premier selection for the discerning driver, offering a sophisticated balance of performance and proven reliability. Meticulously maintained and having successfully passed our rigorous multi-point inspection, the automobile remains in commendable mechanical and cosmetic order. It serves as an exemplary choice for those seeking a high-caliber driving experience without compromise. We invite you to review the exceptional value presented by this well-preserved model.

Hi there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and she’s looking for a new home! This car has been so reliable for me and is still in really solid shape. It's super clean, runs like a dream, and is absolutely perfect for weekend getaways or your daily commute. I’ve taken great care of it, so it's ready for its next big adventure with you. Feel free to reach out if you have any questions—I'd love to chat!

This meticulously maintained E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L high-revving inline-six, delivering linear power delivery up to its 8,000 RPM redline. The drivetrain is anchored by a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory M-variable differential lock, ensuring exceptional corner-exit traction. This example has undergone critical preventative maintenance, including a comprehensive VANOS system overhaul and subframe reinforcement to ensure structural rigidity under high lateral loads. The suspension retains its communicative MacPherson strut front and multi-link rear architecture, providing the precise turn-in and feedback enthusiasts demand. While showing minor aesthetic signs of a life well-driven, the mechanical vitals—including recent valve clearances and rod bearing inspections—are in excellent order, offering a visceral, analog performance experience that remains the benchmark for the segment.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained engine. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear. Reliable performance.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of reliability and style, making it an ideal choice for a discerning buyer. The exterior retains a deep, glossy shine, showing only minor stone chips and faint surface marks typical of careful road use. Inside, the smoke-free cabin features well-preserved upholstery with minimal wear on the driver's bolster and fully functional electronics, including a crisp infotainment display and responsive climate control. Mechanically, the car is in robust health, backed by a complete service history and recent preventative maintenance, including a fresh oil change and comprehensive brake inspection. The engine pulls strongly without hesitation, and the transmission delivers smooth, consistent shifts across all gears. With plenty of tread left on the premium tires and a clean title in hand, this car is ready for the road today without any immediate investment required.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier choice for the discerning driver, offering a harmonious blend of performance and aesthetic preservation. Thoroughly inspected to ensure mechanical integrity, it stands as a testament to consistent care and reliable engineering. We invite you to experience a standard of quality that exceeds expectations, providing a sophisticated driving experience and enduring value.

This vehicle represents a distinguished opportunity for the discerning driver. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a seamless blend of performance and reliability. Featuring a comprehensive service history and a well-preserved interior, this motorcar ensures a superior driving experience. We invite serious inquiries to appreciate the exceptional value and enduring quality of this refined selection.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it's been such a fantastic car. It’s in really wonderful shape and has plenty of life left in it! Whether you’re looking for a reliable daily driver or something for your next road trip, this beauty is ready to go. It’s been super well-loved and drives so smoothly. I’m sure the next owner is going to absolutely love it!

This E92 M3 is a mechanically sound example featuring the high-revving S65 4.0L V8 and a tactile 6-speed manual transmission. The powertrain benefits from the precision of eight individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS variable valve timing, delivering a linear power curve to an 8,400 RPM redline. Preventative maintenance is up to date, including rod bearing replacement and updated throttle actuators. The chassis retains its composure with an M-variable differential lock and Electronic Damper Control (EDC), though minor cosmetic patina is present. This is a driver-focused machine with a reinforced subframe and a documented service history, offering exceptional turn-in response and high-speed stability.
Used car. Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean title. Reliable daily driver.

This vehicle represents a fantastic balance of performance and reliability, having been kept in well-maintained condition throughout its life. The exterior showcases a deep, vibrant paint finish that has been regularly waxed, with only minor cosmetic imperfections typical of careful road use. Step inside to find a pristine, smoke-free interior where the premium upholstery remains firm and comfortable, complemented by a fully operational suite of modern technology and climate control features. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and quietly, benefiting from a documented history of timely oil changes and preventative maintenance. The transmission is responsive, and the suspension provides a composed, comfortable ride over any surface. Equipped with tires that still boast deep tread and brakes that bite with confidence, this car is ready for its next owner to drive away with peace of mind. It is a solid, dependable choice for anyone seeking quality and value.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and sophisticated design. This unit has been thoroughly vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and aesthetic preservation. Offering a balanced synthesis of reliability and executive presence, it represents a premier acquisition for the discerning driver who demands excellence and value in equal measure.
